name: Nova
welcomeMessage: Hey there! I'm your AI sidekick. I'm here 24/7 to help you learn about CHEA, answer security questions, and give you tactical advice for staying safe online. Think of me as your personal cybersecurity coach!
chatWelcome: Hey there! 👋 I'm Nova, your AI cybersecurity buddy. CHEA stands for Cyber Hygiene Educator and Assistant. Ask me about CHEA's features, security tips, or how to stay safe online! 🛡️✨
chatWelcomeWithCount: Hey there! 👋 I'm Nova, your AI cybersecurity buddy. CHEA stands for Cyber Hygiene Educator and Assistant. You have {{count}} free messages remaining. Ask me about CHEA's features, security tips, or how to stay safe online! 🛡️✨
chatSubtitle: Ask me about CHEA or cybersecurity!
placeholder: Ask me about CHEA's features, security tips, or anything else...

limitReached.title: You've used all {count} free messages!
limitReached.welcomeMessage: 🎉 You've used all 10 free messages! Download CHEA for more AI chats and access to all 14 cybersecurity tools. Your security journey continues there! 🚀
